scenarios.name: C1_selective_option_filter
scenarios.description: ACTIVE category/brand filter plus nested BLACK/S/IN_STOCK option filter.

scenarios.name: C2_active_status_filter
scenarios.description: Broad ACTIVE product filter with deterministic review count and product ID ordering.

scenarios.name: C3_deleted_exclusion
scenarios.description: Option filter that only matches the status-changed DELETED product in source rows; ACTIVE filter should return no IDs.

note: The executable smoke script builds equivalent OpenSearch query bodies at runtime so aliases and top-k stay configurable.
